summary.short_summary: This chapter introduces the main ideas of Chemical Coordination and Integration in biology.
summary.detailed_summary: This chapter for Class 11 biology explains the core concepts of Chemical Coordination and Integration. It is intended as a structured study summary for CBSE learners.
